expected.primary user: A developer using it in scripts or CI
expected.information must the text report show: Show category totals followed by Total and Rows.
expected.malformed rows: Fail the whole command with exit code 2 and do not leave a report.
expected.I/O failures: Exit 1 and leave no partial report.
expected.empty input: Treat an empty file like zero rows and emit Total: 0.00 and Rows: 0.
expected.category casing: Preserve the first trimmed spelling while grouping case-insensitively.
expected.output order: Sort categories case-insensitively, then emit Total and Rows.
expected.execution slices: First parse and validate; then aggregate and render.
